title: kobresia nepalensis var. elachista
intro: Kobresia nepalensis var. elachista is a variant of the Kobresia nepalensis plant, commonly known as Nepal Kobresia or Elachista Kobresia, which belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This plant is traditionally used in medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kobresia nepalensis var. elachista include its ability to help manage respiratory issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various diseases, such as bronchitis and coughs. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or a poultice, and its leaves and roots are used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
